privileged_info_summary: Task uses real images from Unsplash as primary data source: photo-1518837695005-2083093ee35b (1000x667px) and fallback photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 (800x533px). Both URLs are publicly accessible real image data. Synthetic fallback image (800x600px with geometric shapes) is created only if both Unsplash URLs fail. Verification uses multi-metric statistical analysis with four criteria: (1) Edge intensity increase ≥50%, (2) Dark pixel percentage increase ≥20 percentage points, (3) Contrast ratio maintained, (4) Pixel changes ≥10% with >30 intensity unit threshold. Pass threshold is 75% (3 out of 4 criteria met). These implementation details match documented specifications in verifier.py.
